---
title: "γ-γ Physics"
description: "Linear Compton and Breit-Wheeler models, validation workflows, and benchmark results."
audience: physics
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

This note collects the physics model and benchmarks of the laser and
photon functionality in *OPALX*.

## Full Workflow {#_full_workflow}

The migrated top-level driver
[`generate-gamma-gamma-results.sh`](scripts/generate-gamma-gamma-results.sh)
regenerates the full published gamma-gamma benchmark state. It builds the
required OPALX benchmark targets, runs the inverse-Compton and Breit-Wheeler
physics tests, calls the shared CAIN helper scripts in `~/git/cain`, and
rerenders the physics notes.

Use it when you want to refresh all benchmark figures and note pages in
one pass:

``` bash
cd Manual-Redesign/physics/gamma-gamma/scripts
./generate-gamma-gamma-results.sh --opalx-build /path/to/OPALX/build_openmp
```

The narrower CAIN-side helpers remain useful when only one of the two
physics notes needs to be regenerated.

The corresponding histogram inputs are stored as the
[gamma-gamma reference dataset]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/datasets/2026/gamma-gamma/2026-04-25-gamma-gamma-reference-data.tar.gz),
outside the text manual.

## Linear Compton Benchmark {#sec-gamma-gamma-linear-compton}

{{< include _linear-compton-benchmark.qmd >}}

## Breit-Wheeler Theory {#sec-gamma-gamma-breit-wheeler}

{{< include _BreitWheeler.qmd >}}
